-- [[ CASCADE PROTECTION ACTIVATED ]]

-- [Layer 1: Environment Map]
local TqEmTIUx = (getfenv and getfenv() or _ENV or _G)
local NSdpkOt = TqEmTIUx["\115\116\114\105\110\103"]
local shKZiip = TqEmTIUx["\116\97\98\108\101"]

-- [Layer 2: Decoding Matrix]
local rIQbrRItva = function(val, key)
    local res, b = 0, 1
    while val > 0 or key > 0 do
        local m1, m2 = val % 2, key % 2
        if m1 ~= m2 then res = res + b end
        val, key, b = (val - m1) / 2, (key - m2) / 2, b * 2
    end
    return NSdpkOt["\99\104\97\114"](res)
end

local VYRQCbXi = {}

-- [Layer 4: Cascade Processing Stream]
for ApsAz = 1, #kTweNxpZH do
    VYRQCbXi[ApsAz] = rIQbrRItva(kTweNxpZH[ApsAz], 70)
end

-- [Layer 5: Safe Execution Pipeline]
local hxSaGSxZH = assert(TqEmTIUx["\108\111\97\100\115\116\114\105\110\103"] or TqEmTIUx["\108\111\97\100"], "Execution Refused")
hxSaGSxZH(shKZiip["\99\111\110\99\97\116"](VYRQCbXi))()
